items.title_zh: 大型语言模型交互推理评估：基于可执行游戏的分层基准
items.title_en: Evaluating Interactive Reasoning in Large Language Models: A Hierarchical Benchmark with Executable Games
items.summary_zh: arXiv 新论文提出了一种多轮交互推理评估框架，将推理视为主动证据获取和信念更新过程。在该框架中，大型语言模型仅接收任务规则，需向隐藏环境发出针对性查询，随时间整合部分观察结果，并决定何时提交最终答案。除了标准成功率和交互效率，该研究还评估了在受控上下文扰动下的鲁棒性，以及通过反事实修正和必要性判断进行的元认知适应。该框架为评估 LLM 的主动推理能力提供了更全面的方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00103v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce a multi-turn interactive framework for reasoning evaluation that treats reasoning as active evidence acquisition and belief updating. Wherein, LLMs receive only the task rules, must issue targeted queries to a hidden environment, integrate partial observations over time, and decide when to submit a final answer. Beyond standard success rate and interaction efficiency, we evaluate contextual robustness under controlled contextual perturbations, and metacognitive adaptation through counterfactual revision and necessity judgment. We ins…
items.why_zh: 该研究提出了更贴近真实交互场景的推理评估方法，超越了传统静态基准。
items.why_en: This work proposes a more realistic evaluation of reasoning in interactive settings, going beyond static benchmarks.

items.title_zh: 模型科学：验证、探索、引导、优化
items.title_en: The Case for Model Science: Verify, Explore, Steer, Refine
items.summary_zh: arXiv 新论文主张 AI 社区应超越基准测试，将模型分析方面的零散工作整合为系统化学科，即“模型科学”。尽管复杂 AI 模型已服务数十亿用户，但我们对它们工作原理的理解远落后于部署能力。数十年来以基准驱动的研究取得了显著进展，但也暴露了其局限性。论文呼吁建立系统性的模型理解方法，包括验证、探索、引导和优化四个环节。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01189v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We argue that the AI community is now ready to move beyond benchmarking and consolidate scattered efforts in model analysis into a systematic discipline, a direction we term Model Science. Complex AI models now serve billions of users, yet our understanding of how they work lags far behind our ability to deploy them. Decades of benchmark-driven research have delivered remarkable progress: extensive leaderboards, a wide range of performance metrics, tracking capability gains across diverse tasks; yet this success has also revealed the limits of be…
items.why_zh: 该论文指出了当前 AI 研究重部署轻理解的弊端，呼吁建立系统性的模型科学。
items.why_en: This paper highlights the gap between AI deployment and understanding, advocating for a systematic discipline of Model Science.

items.title_zh: 极简脑机音乐接口：实时情感驱动声音化系统设计与初步评估
items.title_en: A Minimalist Brain-Computer Musical Interface for Real-Time Emotion-Driven Sonification: System Design and Preliminary Evaluation
items.summary_zh: arXiv 新论文介绍了一种极简脑机音乐接口，可实时将前额 EEG 活动转化为自适应音乐。该系统通过额叶 alpha 不对称性估计情感效价，并利用随机生成算法将其映射到音乐特征（如调式、节奏、音高）。系统集成了无线 EEG 采集、实时 Python 信号处理和基于 Ableton Live 的音乐生成。初步评估显示了该系统在情感声音化方面的潜力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01473v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper presents a minimalist brain-computer Musical Interface (BCMI) that functions as a real-time affective sonification system, translating prefrontal EEG activity into adaptive music. Emotional valence is estimated from frontal alpha asymmetry (AF7/AF8) and mapped to musical features such as mode, tempo, rhythmic density, and pitch register through a stochastic generative algorithm. The system integrates wireless EEG acquisition, real-time Python signal processing, and Ableton Live-based music generation synchronized via Lab Streaming Laye…
items.why_zh: 该研究展示了脑机接口与音乐生成结合的新方向，为情感表达和辅助治疗提供了可能。
items.why_en: This work demonstrates a novel integration of BCI and music generation, with potential for emotional expression and therapy.

items.title_zh: 基于轨迹驱动的多模型智能体系统通用任务表征
items.title_en: Characterization of Multi-Model Agentic AI Systems on General Tasks via Trace-Driven Simulation
items.summary_zh: arXiv 新论文提出了 GAIATrace，这是首个针对两种最先进智能体系统（MiroThinker 和 OWL）在 GAIA 基准上运行的 token 级轨迹数据集。由于智能体 AI 执行高度非确定性、评估成本高昂且专有模型可见性有限，其系统级行为仍难以理解。该数据集为分析多模型智能体系统的行为提供了基础。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01725v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Agentic AI completes tasks through iterative planning, tool use, and reasoning based on observed outcomes. Despite its popularity, its system-level behavior remains poorly understood, particularly for complex datasets and agent architectures-owing to highly non-deterministic execution, prohibitive evaluation costs, and limited visibility into proprietary models. This paper presents GAIATrace, the first token-level trace dataset of two state-of-the-art agentic systems (MiroThinker and OWL) running GAIA, a benchmark composed of a heterogeneous mix…
items.why_zh: 该数据集填补了智能体系统行为分析的空白，有助于理解复杂多模型系统的运作。
items.why_en: This dataset fills a gap in understanding agentic AI system behavior, enabling better analysis of complex multi-model systems.

items.title_zh: SafeMCP：基于环境前瞻推理的 LLM 智能体主动功率调节防御
items.title_en: SafeMCP: Proactive Power Regulation for LLM Agent Defense via Environment-Grounded Look-Ahead Reasoning
items.summary_zh: arXiv 新论文提出 SafeMCP，一种服务器端防御插件，用于约束 LLM 智能体通过模型上下文协议获取工具。随着 LLM 智能体在复杂环境中行动空间扩大，微小错误或幻觉可能被放大为灾难性故障。SafeMCP 通过环境前瞻推理主动调节智能体的“功率”，限制不安全工具获取，从而降低风险。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01991v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: As Large Language Model (LLM) agents increasingly leverage the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to operate in complex environments, the expansion of their action spaces offers agents unsafe capabilities and underscores the risk of power-seeking. While broad action space and greater environment influence are essential for task fulfillment, they create a fragile risk surface where minor errors or hallucinations are magnified into catastrophic failures. In response, we propose SafeMCP, a {server-side} defense plugin that constrains tool acquisition via…
items.why_zh: 该研究针对 LLM 智能体安全风险提出了主动防御机制，具有实际应用价值。
items.why_en: This work addresses safety risks in LLM agents with a proactive defense mechanism, offering practical value.

items.title_zh: BenHalluEval：孟加拉语大型语言模型多任务幻觉评估框架
items.title_en: BenHalluEval: A Multi-Task Hallucination Evaluation Framework for Large Language Models on Bengali
items.summary_zh: arXiv 新论文提出 BenHalluEval，首个针对孟加拉语 LLM 的细粒度幻觉评估框架，涵盖生成式问答、孟加拉语-英语混合问答、摘要和推理四个任务。研究使用 GPT-5.4 构建了 12,000 个幻觉候选样本，涵盖 12 种任务特定幻觉类型，并评估了七个 LLM。该工作填补了孟加拉语幻觉评估的空白。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.31483v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Despite Bengali being the sixth most spoken language in the world, no prior work has systematically evaluated hallucination in large language models (LLMs) for Bengali. We introduce BenHalluEval, a fine-grained hallucination evaluation framework for Bengali covering four tasks: Generative Question Answering (GQA), Bangla-English Code-Mixed QA, Summarization, and Reasoning. We construct 12,000 hallucinated candidates using GPT-5.4 across twelve task-specific hallucination types, drawn from three existing Bengali datasets, and evaluate seven LLMs…
items.why_zh: 该研究填补了孟加拉语 LLM 幻觉评估的空白，对低资源语言 AI 安全具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work fills a gap in hallucination evaluation for Bengali LLMs, crucial for AI safety in low-resource languages.

items.title_zh: 多样性优于频率：重新思考视觉思维链智能体中的工具使用
items.title_en: Diversity Over Frequency: Rethinking Tool Use in Visual Chain-of-Thought Agents
items.summary_zh: arXiv 新论文研究了视觉智能体在复杂视觉推理任务（如 3D 空间推理和医学视觉问答）中的工具使用。研究发现存在“工具使用崩溃”现象：模型倾向于重复使用少数工具，而非多样化探索。论文提出应优先考虑工具多样性而非使用频率，以提升推理性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00096v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Visual agents employ external visual tools within visual chains of thought to incorporate fine-grained evidence. While prior work has mainly studied these tools in visual search tasks, their role in more complex visual reasoning remains underexplored. In this paper, we move beyond simple visual search tasks to investigate more challenging tasks, including 3D spatial reasoning and medical visual question answering, where agents must integrate tool-acquired local evidence with the global context. We identify a {tool-use collapse phenomenon: model…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了视觉智能体工具使用中的关键问题，为优化多工具协作提供了新思路。
items.why_en: This work reveals a critical issue in tool use by visual agents, offering insights for improving multi-tool collaboration.

items.title_zh: CoCoVideo：基于商业模型的高质量对比基准用于 AI 生成视频检测
items.title_en: CoCoVideo: The High-Quality Commercial-Model-Based Contrastive Benchmark for AI-Generated Video Detection
items.summary_zh: arXiv 新论文提出 CoCoVideo，一个基于商业模型的高质量对比基准，用于 AI 生成视频检测。现有数据集多依赖开源视频生成模型，质量远低于商业系统，且部分商业样本带有可见水印。CoCoVideo 使用商业模型生成无水印视频，为检测方法提供更真实的评估环境。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00101v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: With the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence generated content (AIGC) technologies, video forgery has become increasingly prevalent, posing new challenges to public discourse and societal security. Despite remarkable progress in existing deepfake detection methods, AIGC forgery detection remains challenging, as existing datasets mainly rely on open-source video generation models with quality far below that of commercial AIGC systems. Even datasets containing a few commercial samples often retain visible watermarks, compromising authent…
items.why_zh: 该基准更贴近真实 AI 生成视频场景，有助于提升检测方法的实用性和鲁棒性。
items.why_en: This benchmark better reflects real-world AI-generated videos, improving the practicality and robustness of detection methods.

items.title_zh: 结合KAN模块的BiGRU法律文档分类与摘要模型
items.title_en: Enhancing BiGRU with a KAN Block for Legal Document Classification and Summarization
items.summary_zh: 本研究提出了一种基于KAN（Kolmogorov-Arnold网络）模块的BiGRU模型，用于低资源多语言环境下的法律文档分类与摘要任务。为应对领域语言、多语言使用、长上下文依赖和类别不平衡等问题，研究使用了包含孟加拉语、英语和音译孟加拉语的法律文档数据集（来自孟加拉国和Manupatra）。分类任务采用BiGRU模型结合Kolmogorov-Arnold网络，旨在提升法律文档处理的准确性和效率。该工作为低资源法律文本分析提供了新思路。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00116v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This study introduces a novel architecture of KAN-based BiGRU model for the task of classification and summarization of legal documents in a low-resource multilingual setup. In order to tackle problems associated with domain language, the usage of different languages, long dependencies within context, and class imbalance, we employ the dataset composed of legal documents from Bangladesh and taken from Manupatra, which include Bengali, English, and transliterated Bengali languages. Our classification task involves BiGRU model, along with Kolmogo…
items.why_zh: 该研究为低资源多语言法律文档处理提供了高效的新架构，有助于提升法律文本分析的自动化水平。
items.why_en: This work provides an efficient new architecture for low-resource multilingual legal document processing, advancing automation in legal text analysis.

items.title_zh: 基于广义瑞利商优化的基础模型保留适配方法
items.title_en: Foundation-Preserving Adaptation via Generalized Rayleigh-Quotient Optimization
items.summary_zh: 微调基础模型以适应下游任务时，往往会损害预训练中获得的其他能力。现有方法通常通过特殊初始化或固定约束来避免遗忘，但未能动态调节适配与保留的权衡。本文提出FoLoRA（Foundation Preserving LoRA），一种基于遗忘感知的优化框架。通过一阶保留条件，FoLoRA在预训练代理激活上定义遗忘惩罚，从而在微调过程中保持模型的基础能力。实验表明，该方法在适配新任务的同时有效保留了预训练知识。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00132v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: While finetuning effectively adapts foundation models to specialized downstream tasks, it can degrade nontarget capabilities acquired during pretraining. Existing forgetting aware methods typically seek safer updates through specialized initialization or fixed constraints, but do not regulate the adaptation preservation trade-off during training. We propose Foundation Preserving LoRA (FoLoRA), a forgetting aware optimization framework. Guided by a first order preservation condition, FoLoRA defines a forgetting penalty over pretraining-proxy act…
items.why_zh: FoLoRA解决了微调中灾难性遗忘的关键问题，使基础模型在适配新任务时仍能保持原有能力。
items.why_en: FoLoRA addresses catastrophic forgetting in fine-tuning, enabling foundation models to retain pretrained capabilities while adapting to new tasks.

items.title_zh: PrivacyPeek：审计LLM智能体获取的信息而非仅输出内容
items.title_en: PrivacyPeek: Auditing What LLM-Based Agents Acquire, Not Just What They Say
items.summary_zh: 基于LLM的智能体在执行多步任务时会自动调用外部工具，但往往获取超出任务所需的敏感信息。现有隐私基准仅审计智能体响应或对外操作泄露的信息，忽略了数据首次进入智能体上下文时的获取阶段。过度获取的信息可能因一次疏忽或攻击而直接泄露。为此，本文提出PrivacyPeek基准，用于评估智能体在任务执行过程中获取的额外敏感信息。该工作揭示了智能体隐私风险的新维度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00152v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: LLM-based agents are rapidly advancing, autonomously invoking external tools to complete multi-step tasks for users. However, agents often acquire more sensitive information than the task requires. Existing privacy benchmarks audit what the agent's response or outgoing actions disclose, but overlook the acquisition stage where data first enters the agent's context. The over-acquired information is then one careless action or one attack away from an outright leak. To assess its prevalence, we introduce \emph{PrivacyPeek}, a benchmark for evaluat…
items.why_zh: 该研究首次系统审计LLM智能体的信息获取阶段，揭示了现有隐私评估的盲区。
items.why_en: This work systematically audits the information acquisition stage of LLM agents, revealing a blind spot in current privacy evaluations.

items.title_zh: 基于物理信息的定量扩散MRI基础模型
items.title_en: A physics-informed foundation model for quantitative diffusion MRI
items.summary_zh: 理解人脑微观结构需要扩散磁共振成像（MRI），但可靠的定量映射通常需要密集采样和优化协议，局限于专业研究环境。本文提出PIGMENT（物理信息生成微观结构网络），该模型学习人脑微观结构的通用生成先验，并零样本适配到每个受试者。PIGMENT结合物理信息，实现了从稀疏数据中定量估计微观结构参数，有望将定量扩散MRI推广到临床常规应用。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00156v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Understanding the human brain requires access to its microscopic tissue architecture. Diffusion magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) provides the only noninvasive window into whole-brain microstructure in vivo, yet reliable quantitative mapping remains confined to specialized research settings requiring dense sampling and optimized acquisition protocols. To address this gap, we present a physics-informed generative microstructure network (PIGMENT) that learns a universal generative prior of human brain microstructure and adapts it zero-shot to each…
items.why_zh: 该模型有望将定量扩散MRI从专业研究推广到临床常规，促进脑微观结构成像的广泛应用。
items.why_en: This model could bring quantitative diffusion MRI from specialized research to routine clinical use, advancing brain microstructure imaging.

items.title_zh: 针对空中车辆检测的对抗补丁数字到物理迁移
items.title_en: Digital-to-Physical Transfer of Adversarial Patches for Aerial Vehicle Detection
items.summary_zh: 基于深度神经网络的目标检测器广泛应用于航拍和卫星图像分析，但易受对抗样本攻击。本文评估了物理对抗补丁攻击对空中车辆检测器的有效性，通过桥接数字优化和真实部署。对抗补丁在数字环境中优化后打印并应用于真实场景，测试其物理世界中的攻击效果。实验表明，这些补丁在物理条件下仍能有效欺骗检测器，揭示了航拍检测系统的安全漏洞。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00159v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Deep neural network (DNN)-based object detectors are widely used for analyzing aerial and satellite imagery in applications such as environmental monitoring and urban analytics. Despite their strong performance, these models are known to be vulnerable to adversarial examples, and physical adversarial attacks using printable patterns pose realistic security threats. In this paper, we evaluate physical adversarial patch attacks against an aerial vehicle detector by bridging digital optimization and real-world deployment. Adversarial patches are o…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了航拍目标检测系统在物理世界中的安全漏洞，对无人机监控等应用具有重要警示意义。
items.why_en: This work exposes security vulnerabilities in aerial object detection systems under physical attacks, with implications for drone surveillance and similar applications.

items.title_zh: 先检测再回答：视觉语言模型中的幻象检测
items.title_en: Detect Before You Leap: Mirage Detection in Vision-Language Models
items.summary_zh: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在视觉证据缺失、空白或与问题无关时，仍可能生成看似合理的答案，这种失败模式称为“幻象”（mirage）。在医疗和文档视觉问答中，这种无根据的响应可能被误认为基于图像证据，尤其危险。本文研究预响应幻象检测：给定图像-问题对，目标是判断VLM是否应回答或弃权。作者提出了一种检测方法，在模型生成答案前识别幻象风险，从而提高VLM的可靠性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00435v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) can produce confident visual answers even when the required visual evidence is missing, blank, or unrelated to the question. This failure mode, known as mirage (Asadi et al. 2026), is especially concerning in medical and document visual question answering, where plausible but visually ungrounded responses may be mistaken for image-based evidence. We study pre-release mirage detection: given an image-question pair, the goal is to determine whether a VLM should answer or abstain before producing a response. We propos…
items.why_zh: 幻象检测是确保VLM在医疗等高风险领域可靠应用的关键技术。
items.why_en: Mirage detection is crucial for reliable VLM deployment in high-stakes domains like healthcare.

items.title_zh: SPADER：基于多样性探索奖励的多答案问答逐步同伴优势方法
items.title_en: SPADER: Step-wise Peer Advantage with Diversity-Aware Exploration Rewards for Multi-Answer Question Answering
items.summary_zh: 大语言模型作为工具增强智能体，用于获取参数知识之外的信息。现有工作主要关注单答案任务，而许多现实查询需要发现一组完整的有效答案，即多答案问答。该设置面临两个挑战：长搜索轨迹中的细粒度信用分配，以及鼓励持续探索而非仅获取高频答案的奖励对齐。本文提出SPADER方法，通过逐步同伴优势和多样性感知探索奖励，有效解决了多答案问答中的探索与奖励分配问题。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00593v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as tool-augmented agents to acquire information beyond parametric knowledge. While recent work has improved long-horizon tool-use reasoning, most approaches focus on tasks with a single correct answer. In contrast, many real-world queries require discovering a comprehensive set of valid answers, a setting known as Multi-Answer QA. This setting raises two challenges: fine-grained credit assignment over long search trajectories and reward alignment for sustained exploration beyond easy high-frequenc…
items.why_zh: 该研究填补了多答案问答中长轨迹信用分配和探索奖励对齐的空白，扩展了LLM智能体的应用范围。
items.why_en: This work fills the gap in credit assignment and reward alignment for multi-answer QA, expanding the applicability of LLM agents.

items.title_zh: 将因果元建模扩展到非马尔可夫排队系统
items.title_en: Extending Causal Metamodeling to a non-Markovian Queue
items.summary_zh: 离散事件仿真的元模型可以近似仿真模型行为，而无需运行昂贵的仿真。先前工作提出了模块化动态贝叶斯网络（MDBN），一种能用单一训练模型估计多种概率和因果查询的元模型，但仅限于马尔可夫系统。本文通过使用相位型分布近似非指数分布，将MDBN扩展到非马尔可夫排队系统。这一扩展面临新挑战，但为更广泛的仿真场景提供了因果元建模的可能性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00795v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Metamodels for discrete-event simulations approximate the behavior of simulation models without running expensive simulations. Prior work introduced modular dynamic Bayesian networks (MDBNs) -- a class of metamodels that can estimate a range of probabilistic and causal queries (PCQs) using a single, trained model -- but the method was limited to Markovian systems. In this paper, we initiate an extension of MDBNs to non-Markovian queues by approximating non-exponential distributions using phase-type distributions. This approach raises novel chal…
items.why_zh: 该工作将因果元建模从马尔可夫系统扩展到非马尔可夫排队，拓宽了仿真元模型的应用范围。
items.why_en: This work extends causal metamodeling from Markovian to non-Markovian queues, broadening the applicability of simulation metamodels.

items.title_zh: 城市感知中的视觉语言模型基准测试应关注可靠性与协商
items.title_en: Benchmarks for Vision-Language Models in Urban Perception Should Be Reliability-Aware and Negotiated
items.summary_zh: 视觉语言模型（VLM）越来越多地被用于生成街景图像的描述，用于街道审计、地图绘制和公众咨询等任务。这些应用结合了可观察属性与评估类别，而人类目标通常是带有分歧和明确不回答的判断分布。本文认为，对城市感知中的VLM进行基准测试时，应将分歧和弃权视为测量结果，在报告模型对齐度的同时报告注释者间可靠性。研究强调，基准测试应通过协商过程来反映不同利益相关者的视角，从而更全面地评估模型在真实场景中的表现。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00871v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used to generate structured descriptions of street-level imagery for tasks such as streetscape auditing, mapping, and public consultation. These uses combine observable attributes with appraisal categories, and the human targets are often distributions of judgments with disagreement and explicit non-response. This paper argues that benchmarking VLMs for urban perception should treat disagreement and abstention as measurement outcomes, report inter-annotator reliability alongside model alignment, an…
items.why_zh: 该研究指出了当前VLM基准测试的不足，提出了更全面的评估框架，对城市感知应用的可靠性和公平性至关重要。
items.why_en: This study highlights shortcomings in current VLM benchmarks and proposes a more comprehensive evaluation framework, crucial for reliability and fairness in urban perception applications.

items.title_zh: 多时相指代分割的开源基准与基线
items.title_en: An Open-Source Benchmark and Baseline for Multi-temporal Referring Segmentation
items.summary_zh: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）在视觉理解和语言引导定位方面表现出色，但其多时相视觉推理能力尚未得到充分探索。为了填补这一空白，研究者提出了多时相指代分割（MTRS）这一新任务，旨在从多时相图像中分割出语言描述的时间变化。MTRS扩展了传统的指代分割和变化检测，需要同时进行时间对应推理、语言定位和像素级掩码预测。该研究提供了开源基准和基线方法，为后续研究奠定了基础。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00987v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have shown strong visual understanding and language-guided grounding abilities, yet their capacity for multi-temporal visual reasoning remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{Multi-temporal Referring Segmentation (MTRS)}, a new task that aims to segment language-described temporal changes from multi-temporal images. MTRS extends conventional referring segmentation and change detection by jointly requiring temporal correspondence reasoning, language grounding, and pixel-level mask pred…
items.why_zh: 该任务填补了LVLM在多时相视觉推理方面的空白，对视频理解、变化检测等应用具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This task fills a gap in LVLM's multi-temporal visual reasoning, important for video understanding and change detection.

items.title_zh: 基于文本的三维人体运动编辑：跨轴特征融合与关节运动差异预测
items.title_en: Cross-Axis Feature Fusion with Joint-Wise Motion Difference Prediction for Text-Based 3D Human Motion Editing
items.summary_zh: 本文研究基于文本的三维人体运动编辑，目标是在保留源运动风格和结构的同时，根据自然语言描述进行编辑。MotionFix数据集的发布推动了基于扩散模型的训练研究，这些模型直接从源运动和文本指令生成编辑后的运动。以往工作主要关注编辑发生的时间点，而本研究旨在创建一个不仅理解时间方面，还能理解具体哪些关节需要被编辑的模型。通过跨轴特征融合和关节运动差异预测，模型能够更精确地执行编辑。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01014v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We address text-based 3D human motion editing, where the goal is to preserve the style and structure of a source motion while applying edits described in natural language. The release of the MotionFix dataset has spurred active research into training-based diffusion models that directly generate an edited motion from a source motion and a text instruction. While previous works have focused primarily on learning when an edit should occur temporally, our goal is to create a model that understands not only this temporal aspect but also which speci…
items.why_zh: 该研究提升了文本驱动运动编辑的精确度，对动画、虚拟现实和人机交互等领域有重要应用价值。
items.why_en: This research improves precision in text-driven motion editing, valuable for animation, VR, and human-computer interaction.

items.title_zh: TukaBench：面向非洲语言的文化适应性越狱基准测试
items.title_en: TukaBench: A Culturally Grounded Jailbreak Benchmark for African Languages
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）的安全评估仍以英语为中心，低资源语言（尤其是非洲语言）严重缺乏研究。为此，研究者推出了TUKABENCH，一个针对七种非洲语言的越狱基准测试。该基准通过四种设置扩展了JailbreakBench（JBB）：JBB提示的人类翻译、适应非洲语境后的英语提示再翻译、通过与GPT-5.2交互验证的人工策划提示，以及英语与非洲语言混合的代码切换提示。TUKABENCH旨在评估LLM在非洲语言环境下的安全漏洞。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01322v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Safety evaluation of Large Language Models (LLMs) remains heavily English-centric, leaving Low-Resource Languages (LRLs), particularly African ones, critically underexplored. We introduce TUKABENCH, a jailbreak benchmark for seven African languages that extends JailbreakBench (JBB) beyond direct translation through four settings: human translation of JBB prompts, English adaptation to African contexts followed by human translation, human-curated prompts validated through interactions with GPT-5.2, and code-switched prompts combining English and…
items.why_zh: 该基准填补了LLM安全评估在非洲语言方面的空白，对全球AI安全部署至关重要。
items.why_en: This benchmark fills a gap in LLM safety evaluation for African languages, crucial for global AI safety deployment.

items.title_zh: 误导比纠正更容易：LLM从众行为中的有害与有益修正
items.title_en: Easier to Mislead Than to Correct: Harmful and Beneficial Revision in LLM Conformity
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型在多智能体系统中越来越常见，它们会看到并回应其他智能体的答案。一个关键风险是从众行为：模型可能仅仅因为其他智能体同意不同答案而放弃自己的答案。先前研究表明，LLM经常向多数答案修正，但尚不清楚这些修正是纠正错误还是引入新错误。本文通过控制实验，让LLM先回答问题，然后看到模拟的同伴回应，最后做出最终决定。研究发现，LLM更容易被误导而改变正确回答，而不是被纠正错误回答，揭示了从众行为的不对称性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01637v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used in multi-agent systems, where they see and respond to other agents' answers. A key risk is conformity: a model may abandon its own answer simply because others agree on a different one. Prior studies show that LLMs often revise toward a majority answer, but it remains unclear whether these revisions help correct mistakes as often as they introduce new errors. In this paper, we conduct a controlled study in which an LLM first answers a question, then sees simulated peer responses before making a final…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了LLM在多智能体系统中的从众风险，对设计更稳健的AI协作系统具有重要启示。
items.why_en: This study reveals conformity risks in LLM multi-agent systems, important for designing robust AI collaboration.

items.title_zh: 随机极小极大树的双保真度最优动作识别
items.title_en: Two-Fidelity Best-Action Identification for Stochastic Minimax Tree
items.summary_zh: 本文研究随机极小极大树中固定置信度的最优动作识别（BAI）。该问题在现代AI规划中日益重要，深度极小极大搜索和蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）结合语言模型长 rollout 面临基本权衡：启发式评估廉价但有偏，而精确 rollout 可靠但成本高昂。研究者提出2FFS，一种双保真度树搜索算法，将多保真度平面赌博机思想引入树中。该算法结合极小极大式快速扩展与基于rollout的精确评估，在保证置信度的同时提高效率。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01708v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We study fixed-confidence best-action identification (BAI) in stochastic minimax trees. This problem is increasingly relevant in modern AI planning, where deep minimax search and Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) with language model long rollouts face a fundamental tradeoff: heuristic evaluations are cheap but biased, while accurate rollouts are reliable but prohibitively expensive. We propose 2FFS, a two-fidelity tree-search algorithm that brings multi-fidelity flat bandit ideas into trees. The algorithm combines minimax-style fast expansion with…
items.why_zh: 该算法提高了AI规划中决策的效率与可靠性，对游戏AI和复杂规划问题有重要应用。
items.why_en: This algorithm improves efficiency and reliability in AI planning, important for game AI and complex planning problems.

items.title_zh: 揭示大型语言模型从非语言回应推断语用意义的局限性
items.title_en: Unveiling the Limits of Large Language Models in Inferring Pragmatic Meaning from Non-Verbal Responses
items.summary_zh: 尽管大型语言模型（LLM）在语用语言理解方面取得了显著进展，但以往研究主要关注其对语言行为的理解。然而，非语言行为是人类交流的基本组成部分，尤其是在故意单独使用以传达间接含义时。本文首次系统评估了LLM从仅包含非语言回应的对话中推断语用意义的能力。研究探讨了三个问题：LLM能否理解非语言回应的语用含义？不同模型之间的表现有何差异？哪些因素影响其表现？结果表明，LLM在理解非语言语用方面存在显著局限。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01845v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Although large language models (LLMs) have shown considerable progress in pragmatic language understanding, prior research has focused mainly on their comprehension of verbal behavior. Nonetheless, non-verbal behavior remains a fundamental component of human communication, especially when deliberately utilized in isolation to convey indirect meanings. In this work, we present the first systematic evaluation of LLMs' ability to infer pragmatic meaning in dialogue consisting solely of non-verbal responses. We explore three research questions: (1)…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了LLM在非语言交流理解上的短板，对提升人机交互的自然性和深度至关重要。
items.why_en: This study reveals LLM limitations in non-verbal communication understanding, crucial for improving human-AI interaction.

items.title_zh: 大型预训练模型在实例分割任务中的参数高效微调
items.title_en: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Large Pretrained Models for Instance Segmentation Tasks
items.summary_zh: 随着大型预训练模型的兴起，人工智能研究和应用发生了转变，这些模型在众多任务上取得了最先进的结果。然而，参数的大幅增加带来了对参数高效训练策略的需求。尽管取得了显著进展，但针对基于Transformer的模型在实例分割中的参数高效微调（PEFT）方法研究有限。本研究填补了这一空白，调查了PEFT方法在实例分割任务中的有效性，比较了不同方法的性能与效率。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01947v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Research and applications in artificial intelligence have recently shifted with the rise of large pretrained models, which deliver state-of-the-art results across numerous tasks. However, the substantial increase in parameters introduces a need for parameter-efficient training strategies. Despite significant advancements, limited research has explored parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods in the context of transformer-based models for instance segmentation. Addressing this gap, this study investigates the effectiveness of PEFT methods,…
items.why_zh: 该研究为大型模型在实例分割中的高效部署提供了指导，对降低计算成本和推动实际应用具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This study provides guidance for efficient deployment of large models in instance segmentation, important for reducing computational cost and enabling practical applications.

items.title_zh: 无监督认知：基于原语的分层决策方法
items.title_en: Unsupervised Cognition
items.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于原语的无监督学习方法，用于决策制定，灵感来源于一种新颖的认知框架。该方法以表征为中心，以与输入无关的方式将输入空间构建为分布式层次结构。与当前最先进的无监督学习方法相比，该方法在多个任务上展示了竞争力。这项工作为无监督学习提供了新的视角，可能推动更接近人类认知的AI系统发展。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2409.18624v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Unsupervised learning methods have a soft inspiration in cognition models. To this day, the most successful unsupervised learning methods revolve around clustering samples in a mathematical space. In this paper we propose a primitive-based, unsupervised learning approach for decision-making inspired by a novel cognition framework. This representation-centric approach models the input space constructively as a distributed hierarchical structure in an input-agnostic way. We compared our approach with both current state-of-the-art unsupervised l…
items.why_zh: 提出了一种受认知启发的无监督学习新范式，可能突破传统聚类方法的局限。
items.why_en: Proposes a new cognition-inspired unsupervised learning paradigm that may overcome limitations of traditional clustering methods.

items.title_zh: 通过身份桥打破自回归语言模型中的反转诅咒
items.title_en: Breaking the Reversal Curse in Autoregressive Language Models via Identity Bridge
items.summary_zh: 自回归大语言模型在简单逻辑推理中仍会失败，例如“反转诅咒”——当模型学习到“A→B”（如爱丽丝的丈夫是鲍勃）时，无法在测试时推断出“B←A”（如鲍勃的妻子是爱丽丝）。先前研究认为这是自回归因果LLM的固有局限。本文提出了一种名为“身份桥”的方法，通过在训练中引入对称性来缓解这一问题，实验表明该方法能有效提升模型的反向推理能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.02470v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Autoregressive large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in many complex tasks, yet they can still fail in very simple logical reasoning such as the "reversal curse" -- when trained on forward knowledge data of the form "$A \rightarrow B$" (e.g., Alice's husband is Bob), the model is unable to deduce the reversal knowledge "$B \leftarrow A$" (e.g., Bob's wife is Alice) during test. Extensive prior research suggests that this failure is an inherent, fundamental limit of autoregressive causal LLMs, indicating that these mode…
items.why_zh: 挑战了反转诅咒是自回归模型固有局限的观点，并提出可行的解决方案。
items.why_en: Challenges the belief that the reversal curse is an inherent limit of autoregressive models and offers a practical solution.

items.title_zh: LLM-WikiRace基准测试：LLM在真实知识图谱中的规划能力评估
items.title_en: LLM-WikiRace Benchmark: How Far Can LLMs Plan over Real-World Knowledge Graphs?
items.summary_zh: 本文提出了LLM-WikiRace基准，用于评估大语言模型在规划、推理和世界知识方面的能力。模型需要从给定源页面通过维基百科超链接逐步导航到目标页面，这要求前瞻性规划和理解概念间的真实联系。评估了包括Gemini-3、GPT-5和Claude Opus 4.5在内的多种开源和闭源模型，这些模型在简单级别任务上表现最强，但在更复杂场景下仍有挑战。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.16902v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We introduce LLM-Wikirace, a benchmark for evaluating planning, reasoning, and world knowledge in large language models (LLMs). In LLM-Wikirace, models must efficiently navigate Wikipedia hyperlinks step by step to reach a target page from a given source, requiring look-ahead planning and the ability to reason about how concepts are connected in the real world. We evaluate a broad set of open- and closed-source models, including Gemini-3, GPT-5, and Claude Opus 4.5, which achieve the strongest results on the easy level of the task and demonst…
items.why_zh: 提供了一个评估LLM规划与推理能力的新基准，揭示了当前模型在复杂知识导航中的不足。
items.why_en: Provides a new benchmark for evaluating LLM planning and reasoning, revealing limitations in complex knowledge navigation.

items.title_zh: 真相、信任与麻烦：医疗AI的边缘挑战
items.title_en: Truth, Trust, and Trouble: Medical AI on the Edge
items.summary_zh: 大语言模型在自动化医疗问答方面潜力巨大，但确保其事实准确性、有用性和安全性仍是挑战，尤其是开源模型。本文提出了一个严格的基准测试框架，使用超过1000个健康问题数据集，评估模型在诚实、有益和无害三个维度上的表现。结果揭示了事实可靠性与安全性之间的权衡，为医疗AI的部署提供了重要参考。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2507.02983v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) hold significant promise for transforming digital health by enabling automated medical question answering. However, ensuring these models meet critical industry standards for factual accuracy, usefulness, and safety remains a challenge, especially for open-source solutions. We present a rigorous benchmarking framework using a dataset of over 1,000 health questions. We assess model performance across honesty, helpfulness, and harmlessness. Our results highlight trade-offs between factual reliability and safet…
items.why_zh: 系统评估了医疗LLM在关键安全维度上的表现，对实际部署具有重要指导意义。
items.why_en: Systematically evaluates medical LLMs on critical safety dimensions, providing guidance for real-world deployment.

items.title_zh: 与LLM视频通话：六大主流应用的测量研究
items.title_en: Make a Video Call with LLM: A Measurement Campaign over Six Mainstream Apps
items.summary_zh: 2025年，LLM服务推出了AI视频聊天功能，允许用户通过实时视频与AI交互。本文首次系统性地评估了现有AI视频聊天系统的性能，从质量、延迟、内部机制和系统开销四个维度进行了基准测试。通过自定义测试平台，对六款主流AI视频应用进行了评估，揭示了当前系统的性能特征和潜在瓶颈。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2510.00481v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: In 2025, Large Language Model (LLM) services have launched a new feature -- AI video chat -- allowing users to interact with AI agents via real-time video communication (RTC), just like chatting with real people. Despite its significance, no systematic study has characterized the performance of existing AI video chat systems. To address this gap, this paper proposes a comprehensive benchmark across four dimensions: quality, latency, internal mechanisms, and system overhead. Using custom testbeds, we further evaluate six mainstream AI vi…
items.why_zh: 首次对新兴的AI视频聊天系统进行系统性性能评估，为未来优化提供基础。
items.why_en: First systematic performance evaluation of emerging AI video chat systems, providing a foundation for future optimization.

items.title_zh: 只抓一个：面向模型特定授权的不可迁移样本
items.title_en: Catch-Only-One: Non-Transferable Examples for Model-Specific Authorization
items.summary_zh: 近期AI法规强调需要机制来保护数据效用同时防止滥用，但现有方法无法防止数据被用于非预期模型。本文提出了一种新方法，生成“不可迁移样本”，这些样本仅对特定授权模型有效，而对其他模型无效。该方法通过扰动数据使其只能被特定模型正确使用，从而在数据发布后仍能强制执行目的限制。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2510.10982v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Recent AI regulations increasingly emphasize the need for mechanisms that preserve the utility of data for AI innovation while preventing misuse, particularly by enforcing purpose limitation in downstream AI applications. In practice, enforcing this principle remains challenging, as released data can be trivially fed into arbitrary models beyond its declared intent. Existing approaches attempt to mitigate this risk by either perturbing data or retraining models to limit unintended use. These strategies, however, offer no protection agai…
items.why_zh: 提出了一种新颖的数据保护机制，可强制执行AI法规中的目的限制原则。
items.why_en: Proposes a novel data protection mechanism that enforces purpose limitation as required by AI regulations.

items.title_zh: 学习测量：上下文中的主动特征获取
items.title_en: Learning-To-Measure: In-Context Active Feature Acquisition
items.summary_zh: 主动特征获取是一个序列决策问题，目标是通过自适应选择要获取的特征来改进模型性能。现有方法通常针对单一预定任务，限制了可扩展性。本文形式化了元主动特征获取问题，目标是学习跨多种任务的获取策略。通过上下文学习，模型能够在新任务中快速适应，无需重新训练。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2510.12624v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Active feature acquisition (AFA) is a sequential decision-making problem where the goal is to improve model performance for test instances by adaptively selecting which features to acquire. In practice, AFA methods often learn from retrospective data with systematic missingness in the features and limited task-specific labels. Most prior work addresses acquisition for a single predetermined task, limiting scalability. To address this limitation, we formalize the meta-AFA problem, where the goal is to learn acquisition policies across va…
items.why_zh: 将主动特征获取扩展到多任务场景，提高了方法的可扩展性和实用性。
items.why_en: Extends active feature acquisition to multi-task settings, improving scalability and practicality.

items.title_zh: 从片段到场景：基于视觉语言模型的自动驾驶时序理解
items.title_en: From Segments to Scenes: Temporal Understanding in Autonomous Driving via Vision-Language Model
items.summary_zh: 视觉语言模型越来越多地被用作自动驾驶等安全关键系统的感知和推理骨干。可靠的时序理解对于预测事件、归因原因和安全驾驶至关重要，但现有视频基准多关注其他内容（如体育、烹饪），缺乏针对自动驾驶的专门基准。本文提出了一个新的基准，专门评估VLM在自动驾驶场景中的时序理解能力，揭示了当前最先进模型在此任务上的显著挑战。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2512.05277v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as the perception and reasoning backbone of autonomous agents acting in the wild, with autonomous driving (AD) being one of the most safety-critical instances. Reliable temporal understanding is essential for such agents to anticipate events, attribute causes, and act safely in dynamic environments, yet this remains a significant challenge even for state-of-the-art (SoTA) VLMs. Prior video benchmarks have emphasized other content (sports, cooking, etc.), yet no existing benchmark f…
items.why_zh: 填补了自动驾驶领域VLM时序理解评估的空白，对提升系统安全性至关重要。
items.why_en: Fills the gap in evaluating temporal understanding of VLMs for autonomous driving, crucial for safety.

items.title_zh: NVIDIA数据中心GPU取得了多大进展？
items.title_en: How Much Progress Has There Been in NVIDIA Datacenter GPUs?
items.summary_zh: 随着现代图形处理器（GPU）在多种计算任务中日益关键，分析其过去和当前的进展对于确定未来科学研究的限制至关重要。在人工智能领域，快速的技术进步和激烈的全球竞争促使美国最近实施出口管制法规，限制国际社会获取先进AI芯片。本文旨在系统性地研究NVIDIA数据中心GPU的技术演进，评估其性能提升和架构创新，并探讨这些进展对AI研究和应用的影响。通过分析历史数据和最新技术指标，论文揭示了GPU性能的增长趋势，并讨论了出口管制可能对全球AI发展带来的挑战。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2601.20115v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: As the role of modern Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) becomes increasingly essential for several computing tasks, analyzing their past and current progress is paramount for determining future constraints on scientific research. This is particularly compelling in the Artificial Intelligence (AI) domain, where rapid technological advancements and fierce global competition have led the United States to recently implement export control regulations limiting international access to advanced AI chips. Consequently, this paper examines techni…
items.why_zh: 理解NVIDIA GPU的进展对于把握AI算力瓶颈和全球芯片竞争格局至关重要。
items.why_en: Understanding NVIDIA GPU progress is crucial for grasping AI compute bottlenecks and global chip competition.

items.title_zh: Med-Scout：通过几何感知强化学习后训练治愈多模态大模型的医学感知几何盲点
items.title_en: Med-Scout: Curing MLLMs' Geometric Blindness in Medical Perception via Geometry-Aware RL Post-Training
items.summary_zh: 尽管多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在医学诊断中展现出语言能力，但研究发现即使是顶尖的MLLMs也存在关键的感知缺陷：几何盲点。这种缺陷导致模型输出看似合理但实际错误的幻觉，根源在于训练范式优先考虑语言流畅性而非几何保真度。本文提出Med-Scout框架，通过强化学习（RL）利用几何约束来“治愈”这一盲点。该方法在医学图像分析任务中显著提升了模型对空间关系和几何结构的理解，减少了幻觉输出，为可靠医学AI诊断提供了新途径。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2601.23220v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Despite recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs)' linguistic prowess in medical diagnosis, we find even state-of-the-art MLLMs suffer from a critical perceptual deficit: geometric blindness. This failure to ground outputs in objective geometric constraints leads to plausible yet factually incorrect hallucinations, rooted in training paradigms that prioritize linguistic fluency over geometric fidelity. This paper introduces Med-Scout, a novel framework that "cures" this blindness via Reinforcement Learning (RL) that leverages the…
items.why_zh: 几何盲点是医学AI安全的关键隐患，Med-Scout提供了一种有效的矫正方法。
items.why_en: Geometric blindness is a critical safety issue in medical AI; Med-Scout offers an effective remedy.

items.title_zh: 固定预算不比固定置信度更难：最佳臂识别问题中的对数因子分析
items.title_en: Fixed Budget is No Harder Than Fixed Confidence in Best-Arm Identification up to Logarithmic Factors
items.summary_zh: 最佳臂识别（BAI）是交互式机器学习中的基本问题，分为固定预算（FB）和固定置信度（FC）两种设置。对于具有唯一最佳臂的K臂赌博机，两种设置的最优样本复杂度已被确定，且在对数因子内匹配。本文研究更一般的结构化BAI问题，证明FB并不比FC更难，反之亦然。通过理论分析和算法设计，论文展示了两种设置之间的紧密联系，为实际应用中的算法选择提供了指导。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.03972v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The best-arm identification (BAI) problem is one of the most fundamental problems in interactive machine learning, which has two flavors: the fixed-budget setting (FB) and the fixed-confidence setting (FC). For $K$-armed bandits with a unique best arm, the optimal sample complexities for both settings have been settled down, and they match up to logarithmic factors. This prompts an interesting research question about the generic, potentially structured BAI problems: is FB harder than FC or the other way around? In this paper, we show th…
items.why_zh: 该结果统一了BAI问题的两种主流设置，简化了算法设计与分析。
items.why_en: This result unifies two main BAI settings, simplifying algorithm design and analysis.

items.title_zh: DARPA AI网络挑战赛（AIxCC）：竞赛设计、架构与经验教训系统分析
items.title_en: SoK: DARPA's AI Cyber Challenge (AIxCC): Competition Design, Architectures, and Lessons Learned
items.summary_zh: DARPA的AI网络挑战赛（AIxCC，2023-2025）是迄今为止规模最大的竞赛，旨在构建完全自主的网络推理系统（CRS），利用AI（特别是大语言模型）发现并修复真实开源软件中的漏洞。本文首次对AIxCC进行系统分析，基于设计文档、源代码、执行轨迹以及与组织者和参赛团队的讨论，审视了竞赛的结构和关键设计决策。论文总结了竞赛中使用的架构方法、技术挑战以及获得的经验教训，为未来自主网络安全系统的发展提供了重要参考。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.07666v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: DARPA's AI Cyber Challenge (AIxCC, 2023--2025) is the largest competition to date for building fully autonomous cyber reasoning systems (CRSs) that leverage recent advances in AI -- particularly large language models (LLMs) -- to discover and remediate vulnerabilities in real-world open-source software. This paper presents the first systematic analysis of AIxCC. Drawing on design documents, source code, execution traces, and discussions with organizers and competing teams, we examine the competition's structure and key design decisions,…
items.why_zh: AIxCC代表了AI驱动网络安全的前沿，其经验教训对自主漏洞修复具有里程碑意义。
items.why_en: AIxCC represents the frontier of AI-driven cybersecurity; its lessons are landmark for autonomous vulnerability remediation.

items.title_zh: Med-V1：用于零样本可扩展生物医学证据归因的小语言模型
items.title_en: Med-V1: Small Language Models for Zero-shot and Scalable Biomedical Evidence Attribution
items.summary_zh: 评估文章是否支持某个断言对于幻觉检测和声明验证至关重要。虽然大语言模型（LLMs）可以自动化此任务，但达到强性能需要GPT-5等前沿模型，部署成本过高。为了高效进行生物医学证据归因，本文提出Med-V1，一个仅有三亿参数的小语言模型家族。通过使用本研究新开发的高质量合成数据进行训练，Med-V1在零样本设置下显著优于同等规模的模型，甚至在某些任务上超越了大模型。该模型为大规模生物医学证据验证提供了经济高效的解决方案。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2603.05308v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Assessing whether an article supports an assertion is essential for hallucination detection and claim verification. While large language models (LLMs) have the potential to automate this task, achieving strong performance requires frontier models such as GPT-5 that are prohibitively expensive to deploy at scale. To efficiently perform biomedical evidence attribution, we present Med-V1, a family of small language models with only three billion parameters. Trained on high-quality synthetic data newly developed in this study, Med-V1 substa…
items.why_zh: Med-V1证明了小模型在专业领域可以替代昂贵的大模型，推动AI在生物医学中的可及性。
items.why_en: Med-V1 shows small models can replace expensive large models in specialized domains, advancing AI accessibility in biomedicine.

items.title_zh: Claudini：自动研究发现针对大语言模型的最先进对抗攻击算法
items.title_en: Claudini: Autoresearch Discovers State-of-the-Art Adversarial Attack Algorithms for LLMs
items.summary_zh: 本文展示AI代理能够自主发现针对大语言模型的新型对抗攻击算法，在白盒越狱和提示注入评估中达到了最先进水平。研究团队部署了Claude Code和Codex等前沿代理，在自动研究循环中访问包含30多种先前方法的库和固定计算预算的评估脚本。该流水线成功越狱了OpenAI的GPT-OSS-Safeguard-20B，并对抗鲁棒模型Meta-SecAlign-70B实现了提示注入。此外，通过自动研究发现的算法在多个基准测试中超越了现有方法，揭示了LLM安全防御的新漏洞。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2603.24511v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We show that AI agents are capable of discovering novel algorithms for adversarial attacks against LLMs, advancing the state of the art on white-box jailbreaking and prompt injection evaluations. We deploy frontier agents, such as Claude Code and Codex, in an autoresearch loop with access to a library of 30+ prior methods and an evaluation script with a fixed compute budget. We show this pipeline to be effective in jailbreaking OpenAI's GPT-OSS-Safeguard-20B and in prompt injections against Meta-SecAlign-70B, an adversarially robust model. Fo…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了AI自动发现攻击算法的能力，对LLM安全防御构成严峻挑战。
items.why_en: This work reveals AI's ability to autonomously discover attack algorithms, posing a serious challenge to LLM security.

items.title_zh: U-Cast：一个出奇简单高效的边界概率AI天气预报器
items.title_en: U-Cast: A Surprisingly Simple and Efficient Frontier Probabilistic AI Weather Forecaster
items.summary_zh: 基于AI的天气预报现已能与传统物理集合预报相媲美，但最先进的模型依赖专门架构和巨大计算预算，入门门槛高。本文证明这种复杂性对于边界性能并非必要。作者提出U-Cast，一个基于标准U-Net骨干网络的概率预报器，采用简单训练方案：先以平均绝对误差进行确定性预训练，再以连续排序概率评分进行短概率微调。在多个基准测试中，U-Cast以极低的计算成本达到了与复杂模型相当的预报精度，为高效AI天气预报开辟了新路径。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.09041v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: AI-based weather forecasting now rivals traditional physics-based ensembles, but state-of-the-art (SOTA) models rely on specialized architectures and massive computational budgets, creating a high barrier to entry. We demonstrate that such complexity is unnecessary for frontier performance. We introduce \ours, a probabilistic forecaster built on a standard U-Net backbone trained with a simple recipe: deterministic pre-training on Mean Absolute Error followed by short probabilistic fine-tuning on the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (…
items.why_zh: U-Cast降低了AI天气预报的门槛，使更多机构能以低成本获得高质量预报。
items.why_en: U-Cast lowers the barrier for AI weather forecasting, enabling high-quality predictions at low cost.

items.title_zh: 超越视觉保真度：通过下游任务集成评估遥感图像超分辨率模型
items.title_en: Beyond Visual Fidelity: Benchmarking Super-Resolution Models for Large-Scale Remote Sensing Imagery via Downstream Task Integration
items.summary_zh: 超分辨率（SR）技术在从低分辨率输入重建高分辨率图像方面取得了重大进展。提高分辨率可增强视觉质量并有利于监测任务，特别是在卫星对地观测中，应用于城市规划、农业、生态和灾害响应。然而，现有SR研究和基准通常使用PSNR或SSIM等保真度指标，而超分辨率图像的真实效用在于其对下游任务的提升。本文提出通过下游任务集成来评估SR模型，在遥感场景中测试了多种SR方法对目标检测、分割等任务的影响，发现保真度指标与任务性能之间存在显著差异，呼吁采用任务导向的评估标准。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.00310v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Super-resolution (SR) techniques have made major advances in reconstructing high-resolution images from low-resolution inputs. The increased resolution provides visual enhancement and utility for monitoring tasks. In particular, SR has been increasingly developed for satellite-based Earth observation, with applications in urban planning, agriculture, ecology, and disaster response. However, existing SR studies and benchmarks typically use fidelity metrics such as PSNR or SSIM, whereas the true utility of super-resolved images lies in su…
items.why_zh: 该研究挑战了传统超分辨率评估方式，推动遥感领域采用更实用的任务导向基准。
items.why_en: This work challenges traditional SR evaluation, promoting task-oriented benchmarks for remote sensing.

items.title_zh: Muon优化器需要多少正交化？
items.title_en: How Much Orthogonalization Does Muon Need?
items.summary_zh: Muon优化器通过用近似半正交更新替代病态动量更新来改进神经网络训练。本文通过为Muon的低精度奇异值带直接推导一个宽松的三次牛顿-舒尔茨调度，研究了Muon实际需要多少正交化。由此产生的五步三次构造使用了十次主导矩阵乘法，而五次五次牛顿-舒尔茨迭代需要十五次。三次调度并非旨在作为……
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00371v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Muon optimizers improve neural-network training by replacing ill-conditioned momentum updates with approximately semi-orthogonal updates. This motivates a practical question: how much orthogonalization does Muon actually require? We study this question using a relaxed cubic Newton--Schulz schedule derived directly for Muon's low precision singular value band. The resulting five-step cubic construction uses ten dominant matrix multiplications, compared with fifteen for five quintic Newton--Schulz iterations. The cubic schedule is not intended as a…
items.why_zh: 该研究为Muon优化器的正交化需求提供了理论指导，有助于提升训练效率。
items.why_en: This study provides theoretical guidance on the orthogonalization requirements of Muon optimizers, potentially improving training efficiency.

items.title_zh: 用于行程级公交预测的时空多任务图Transformer
items.title_en: Spatiotemporal Multi-Task Graph Transformer for Trip-Level Transit Prediction
items.summary_zh: 公共交通系统的乘客计数数据揭示了城市出行模式，对规划、运营和优化至关重要。然而，站点和线路之间的非线性时空相互依赖关系使得建模和预测具有挑战性。现有方法通常依赖于固定的时间、空间或站点级公式，限制了它们捕捉行程内演变和网络上下文的能力。本研究提出了SMT-GraphFormer，一种将行程级公交预测构建为……的时空多任务图Transformer。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00572v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Passenger count data from public transit systems reveals urban mobility patterns and is essential for planning, operation, and optimisation. However, non-linear spatiotemporal interdependencies across stops and lines make modelling and prediction challenging. Existing approaches often rely on fixed temporal, spatial, or stop-level formulations, limiting their ability to capture within-trip evolution and network context. This study proposes SMT-GraphFormer, a spatiotemporal multi-task graph transformer that frames trip-level transit prediction as…
items.why_zh: 该模型能更准确地预测公交客流，有助于优化公共交通运营和规划。
items.why_en: This model improves transit passenger prediction accuracy, aiding in optimizing public transit operations and planning.

items.title_zh: CUPID在模型动物园中：为你的梦想LLM在线匹配
items.title_en: CUPID in the Model Zoo: Online Matchmaking for Selecting Your Dream LLM
items.summary_zh: 用户面临着从快速增长的大语言模型池中为给定任务选择合适的LLM的挑战，每个模型都有独特但通常不透明的潜在属性。此外，用户可能缺乏明确表达他们重视的LLM响应或部署特征的词汇或意识。本文提出了一种交互高效的主动学习框架，其中决斗老虎机算法迭代选择LLM对，收集用户对其响应的反馈，并更新其对……的信念。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00846v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Users increasingly face the challenge of selecting an appropriate LLM for a given task from a rapidly growing pool of LLMs, each with distinct but often opaque latent properties. Compounding this challenge, users may lack the vocabulary or awareness to explicitly articulate the characteristics they value in an LLM's responses or deployment. We propose an interaction-efficient active learning framework in which a dueling bandit algorithm iteratively selects pairs of LLMs, collects user feedback about their responses, and updates its belief about t…
items.why_zh: 该框架帮助用户高效选择最适合其需求的LLM，降低选择成本。
items.why_en: This framework helps users efficiently select the most suitable LLM for their needs, reducing selection cost.

items.title_zh: CRePE：基于卷积感知的相对重要性进行高效搜索的后训练剪枝
items.title_en: CRePE: Convolution-aware Relative Importance in Post-training Pruning with Efficient Search
items.summary_zh: 部署大语言模型会带来巨大的内存和计算成本。后训练剪枝是一种通过移除权重来降低这些成本的有效方法，无需额外训练。现有方法中，RIA引入了由行和列和归一化的相对重要性分数，实现了最先进的精度。然而，RIA仅考虑一维十字形（行/列）方向信息，并对行和列贡献赋予相等权重。本文提出了CRePE，它……
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01544v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Deploying Large Language Models (LLMs) in practice incurs substantial memory and computational costs. Post-training pruning (PTP) is an effective approach to reducing these costs by removing weights without additional training. Among existing methods, RIA introduces relative importance scores normalized by row and column sums, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy. However, RIA considers only 1D cross-shaped (row/column) directional information and assigns equal weight to row and column contributions. In this paper, we propose \textbf{CRePE}, which…
items.why_zh: CRePE在保持模型精度的同时进一步压缩LLM，有利于实际部署。
items.why_en: CRePE further compresses LLMs while maintaining accuracy, facilitating practical deployment.

items.title_zh: 可信生成式逆问题的测量几何与设计
items.title_en: Measurement Geometry and Design for Trustworthy Generative Inverse Problems
items.summary_zh: 生成模型越来越多地被用作逆问题的先验，但它们生成逼真图像的能力带来了一个基本的信任问题：一个看似合理的重建可能由测量支持，也可能由先验沿着未观察到的方向填充。这种区别在医学成像中尤为重要，因为采集操作是在扫描时间、剂量和校准约束下设计的。本文从测量几何的角度研究生成式逆问题。核心问题是，一个固定的测量……
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.02309v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Generative models are increasingly used as priors for inverse problems, but their ability to produce realistic images creates a basic trust problem: a plausible reconstruction may be supported by the measurements, or it may be filled in by the prior along unobserved directions. This distinction is especially important in medical imaging, where acquisition operators are designed under scan-time, dose, and calibration constraints. We study generative inverse problems from a measurement-geometry perspective. The central question is whether a fixed m…
items.why_zh: 该研究有助于确保生成式逆问题的重建结果可信，尤其在医学影像等安全关键领域。
items.why_en: This research helps ensure trustworthy reconstructions in generative inverse problems, especially in safety-critical fields like medical imaging.

items.title_zh: ChWDTA：用于学习图像压缩的通道级小波域Transformer注意力与熵建模
items.title_en: ChWDTA: Channel-wise Wavelet-Domain Transformer Attention and Entropy Modeling for Learned Image Compression
items.summary_zh: 最先进的学习图像压缩方案越来越多地基于混合CNN-Transformer架构。为了进一步提高率失真性能，本文将通道级小波变换引入Transformer和熵编码组件。首先，提出了通道级小波域Transformer注意力机制。ChWDTA保留了现代LIC骨干中使用的有效窗口空间自注意力，但在将注意力映射回空间域之前，在通道级小波变换特征上计算Q/K/V投影。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00111v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: State-of-the-art learned image compression (LIC) schemes are increasingly based on hybrid CNN-transformer architectures. To further improve rate-distortion performance, we introduce channel-wise wavelet transforms into both the transformer and entropy-coding components. First, we propose a channel-wise wavelet-domain transformer attention (ChWDTA) mechanism. ChWDTA keeps the efficient windowed spatial self-attention used in modern LIC backbones, but computes the Q/K/V projections on channel-wise wavelet-transformed features before mapping the a…
items.why_zh: ChWDTA提升了学习图像压缩的率失真性能，有望应用于更高效的图像存储和传输。
items.why_en: ChWDTA improves rate-distortion performance in learned image compression, promising more efficient image storage and transmission.

items.title_zh: 参数更新稀疏的线性上下文老虎机的实用最优算法
items.title_en: Practical and Optimal Algorithm for Linear Contextual Bandits with Rare Parameter Updates
items.summary_zh: 本文研究参数更新稀疏的线性上下文老虎机：学习器只能在少量更新时间点将奖励反馈纳入其参数估计，同时仍在线观察上下文并顺序选择动作。这一观点澄清了文献中经常模糊的一个实际区别：许多“严格批处理”方法额外限制了区间内的上下文自适应性，意味着区间内的动作规则不能依赖于该区间内已实现的上下文/动作序列。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00984v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We study linear contextual bandits under rare parameter updates: the learner may incorporate reward feedback into its parameter estimate only at a small number of update times, while still observing contexts online and selecting actions sequentially. This viewpoint clarifies a practical distinction that is often blurred in the literature: many "strictly batched" methods additionally restrict within-interval context adaptivity, meaning that the action rule inside an interval cannot depend on the sequence of realized contexts/actions in that inte…
items.why_zh: 该算法在参数更新受限的场景下仍能实现最优性能，适用于实际中计算资源有限的在线学习。
items.why_en: This algorithm achieves optimal performance even with rare parameter updates, suitable for online learning with limited computational resources.

items.title_zh: 感知优先：具有自一致性的前沿原生视频模型用于隐式视频问答
items.title_en: Perception First: A Frontier Native-Video Model with Self-Consistency for Implicit Video Question Answering
items.summary_zh: 本文描述了我们在CVPR 2026 VRR挑战赛中的提交，基于ImplicitQA/VRR-QA基准：多项选择视频问答，其中答案故意不在任何单个帧中可观察，必须从创意视频的不连续帧中的空间布局、运动、深度、视角、因果关系和社会背景推断。我们进行了一项系统的、无需训练的研究，涵盖了开源视频大语言模型（Qwen2.5-VL、Qwen3-VL、InternVL3、Gemma-3等）。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01485v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We describe our submission to the VRR Challenge @ CVPR 2026, built on the \emph{ImplicitQA} / \emph{VRR-QA} benchmark~\cite{implicitqa}: multiple-choice video question answering in which answers are deliberately \emph{not} observable in any single frame and must be inferred from spatial layout, motion, depth, viewpoint, causality, and social context across discontinuous frames of creative video. We conduct a systematic, training-free study spanning open-source Video-LMMs (Qwen2.5-VL~\cite{qwen25vl}, Qwen3-VL~\cite{qwen3vl}, InternVL3, Gemma-3,…
items.why_zh: 该研究推动了视频理解模型在需要深层推理的隐式问答任务上的能力。
items.why_en: This research advances video understanding models on implicit QA tasks requiring deep reasoning.

items.title_zh: FlatVPR：即插即用的几何线性残差适配器，用于基础模型特征流形的几何校正
items.title_en: FlatVPR: Plug-and-play Geo-linear Residual Adapter for Geometric Rectification of Foundation Model Feature Manifolds
items.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种名为FlatVPR的新型几何校正范式，旨在解决视觉位置识别（VPR）中地图轻量级与定位精度之间的权衡问题。该方法通过强制特征流形结构，使得两个相邻锚点之间的任何描述符都可以通过线性插值精确重建。实验表明，FlatVPR能够有效提升基础模型在VPR任务中的性能，同时保持较低的计算开销。该工作为VPR系统的实际部署提供了新的思路。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.01734v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper proposes ``FlatVPR,'' a novel geometric rectification paradigm that effectively bridges the trade-off between map lightweightness and localization accuracy in visual place recognition (VPR) by enforcing a feature manifold structure where any descriptor between two adjacent anchors $\mathbf{z}_A$ and $\mathbf{z}_B$ can be accurately reconstructed via linear interpolation $\hat{\mathbf{z}}_{pseudo} = (1-t)\mathbf{z}_A + t\mathbf{z}_B$, where $t \in [0,1]$ denotes the relative position. While state-of-the-art foundation models such as D…
items.why_zh: FlatVPR提出了一种即插即用的几何校正方法，有效解决了VPR中地图轻量级与定位精度的矛盾，对实际部署具有重要意义。
items.why_en: FlatVPR introduces a plug-and-play geometric rectification method that effectively addresses the trade-off between map lightweightness and localization accuracy in VPR, crucial for practical deployment.

items.title_zh: 揭示思维链推理的熵动力学
items.title_en: Unveiling the Entropy Dynamics of Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
items.summary_zh: 本文研究了思维链（CoT）推理过程中的熵动力学，发现了一致的两阶段结构：探索的不确定性区域突然转变为收敛的置信区域。置信区域具有两个关键特性：高可靠性（答案准确稳定）和高冗余（模型在得到正确答案后仍生成不必要的标记）。这些特性为更高效、更可靠的推理策略提供了可能。该工作有助于理解CoT的内部机制并优化其应用。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.02020v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper investigates the entropy dynamics of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and uncovers a consistent two-phase structure: an Uncertainty Region of exploration transitioning sharply to a Confidence Region of convergence. We demonstrate that the Confidence Region possesses two critical properties: 1) High Reliability -- answers in the confidence region become highly accurate and stable, and 2) High Redundancy -- models generate unnecessary tokens long after reaching the correct answer. These properties unlock more efficient and reliable inference str…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了思维链推理的熵动力学，为理解其内部机制和优化推理效率提供了关键见解。
items.why_en: This study unveils the entropy dynamics of Chain-of-Thought reasoning, providing key insights into its internal mechanism and optimization for efficient inference.

items.title_zh: 基于不确定性感知图神经网络的稀疏传感器城市温度场重建
items.title_en: Uncertainty-Aware Graph Neural Reconstruction of Urban Temperature Fields from Sparse Sensors under Deployment Constraints
items.summary_zh: 本研究提出了一种不确定性感知的图神经网络框架，用于从稀疏传感器重建每日最高温度场，并支持距离约束的传感器放置和概率超标映射。该模型同时预测温度场和空间变化的预测不确定性，有助于城市气候监测和热风险分析。实验表明，该方法在传感器预算有限的情况下仍能有效重建温度场。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.02038v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reconstructing spatially continuous daily temperature fields from sparse observations is important for urban climate monitoring and heat-risk analysis, but practical deployments are limited by sensor budgets and spacing constraints. This study proposes an uncertainty-aware graph neural network (GNN) framework for reconstructing daily maximum temperature fields from sparse sensors while supporting distance-constrained sensor placement and probabilistic exceedance mapping. The model predicts both the temperature field and a spatially varying pred…
items.why_zh: 该工作为城市气候监测和热风险分析提供了一种在传感器预算有限条件下的有效温度场重建方法。
items.why_en: This work provides an effective method for reconstructing temperature fields under limited sensor budgets, crucial for urban climate monitoring and heat-risk analysis.

items.title_zh: 基于解耦的等变学习用于组合视觉问答
items.title_en: Disentanglement-Based Equivariant Learning for Compositional VQA
items.summary_zh: 本文针对组合视觉问答（VQA）任务，提出了一种基于解耦的等变学习方法。现有方法往往忽略潜在概念的解耦，且依赖额外线索进行训练，不适用于真实场景。该方法通过解耦底层概念并捕捉组合变化机制，提升了模型对未见组合的理解能力。实验表明，该方法在多个基准数据集上取得了优异性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.02168v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Compositional visual question answering (VQA) represents a challenging yet fundamental task that requires models to comprehend novel combinations of previously learned concepts. The current methods often overlook the disentanglement of underlying concepts and are restricted in terms of their ability to effectively capture the compositional variation mechanism. Moreover, the state-of-the-art techniques depend on additional clues for training, which is not feasible in real-world VQA scenarios. To address these issues, in this paper, we introduce…
items.why_zh: 该工作解决了组合VQA中概念解耦和组合变化机制捕捉的难题，推动了模型在真实场景中的应用。
items.why_en: This work addresses the challenges of concept disentanglement and compositional variation capture in compositional VQA, advancing real-world applicability.

items.title_zh: 通过稀疏张量分解学习细粒度参数共享
items.title_en: Learning Fine-grained Parameter Sharing via Sparse Tensor Decomposition
items.summary_zh: 本文提出了一种名为FiPS的细粒度参数共享框架，用于压缩Transformer的多层感知器（MLP）。该框架结合了跨块参数共享、低秩分解和稀疏性，通过统一优化实现模型压缩。FiPS将MLP权重拼接成张量，并应用稀疏张量分解，在保持性能的同时显著减少参数数量。实验表明，该方法在多个任务上优于现有压缩技术。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2411.09816v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large neural networks achieve state-of-the-art performance on many tasks, yet their sheer size hinders deployment on resource-constrained devices. Among existing compression approaches, cross-layer parameter sharing remains relatively unexplored for transformer models. In this paper, we introduce Fine-grained Parameter Sharing (FiPS), a unified framework for compressing transformer Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) that combines cross-block parameter sharing, low-rank factorization, and sparsity in a single optimization. FiPS concatenates MLP we…
items.why_zh: FiPS为Transformer模型提供了一种高效的压缩方法，结合了多种技术，在资源受限设备上部署大型模型具有重要意义。
items.why_en: FiPS offers an efficient compression method for Transformer models, combining multiple techniques, crucial for deploying large models on resource-constrained devices.

items.title_zh: LLMSynthor：基于大语言模型的宏观对齐微观记录合成
items.title_en: LLMSynthor: Macro-Aligned Micro-Records Synthesis with Large Language Models
items.summary_zh: 本文提出了LLMSynthor，一种利用预训练大语言模型生成宏观对齐微观记录的方法。在社会科学和城市研究中，微观记录对于可信模拟至关重要，但大规模收集不切实际。LLMSynthor将LLM转变为宏观感知模拟器，生成与宏观统计数据一致的逼真微观记录。该方法在流行病模型等应用中展示了有效性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2505.14752v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Macro-aligned micro-records are crucial for credible simulations in social science and urban studies. For example, epidemic models are only reliable when individual-level mobility and contacts mirror real behavior, while aggregates match real-world statistics like case counts or travel flows. However, collecting such fine-grained data at scale is impractical, leaving researchers with only macro-level data. LLMSynthor addresses this by turning a pretrained LLM into a macro-aware simulator that generates realistic micro-records consistent with…
items.why_zh: LLMSynthor解决了社会科学和城市研究中微观数据难以大规模收集的问题，为可信模拟提供了新途径。
items.why_en: LLMSynthor addresses the challenge of collecting fine-grained data at scale for social science and urban studies, enabling credible simulations.
